title: Protocols for rapid drug desensitisation with biologics
author: Rasmussen, Trine Holm
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The document contains a one-bag RDD protocol for intravenously administered biologic drugs and a protocol for the rapid desensitisation of the subcutaneously administered drug eanercept.
steps_raw: The document contains a one-bag RDD protocol for intravenously administered biologic drugs and a protocol for the rapid desensitisation of the subcutaneously administered drug eanercept.
